post.description: Refine a failed SPARQL query and retry. Call when sparql_query returns 0 results or an error. Provide the original question, failed SPARQL, and reason for failure.

failed_sparql.description: The SPARQL query that failed or returned 0 results

failure_reason.description: Why the query failed, e.g. "0 results returned"

attempt_number.description: Refinement attempt number, starting at 1, max 3
